title: K-200 Integration Subsystem Specification
text:
# K-200 Integration Subsystem Specification

Document number: MD-DOC-440-E. Revision: E. Type: specification. Author: Jordan Kim. Created: 2025-04-21. Last modified: 2025-07-31. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Integration subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1071, P-1166.
